request_id.description: Unique identifier for the originating request (trace correlation)

seed_id.description: PRNG seed identifier for deterministic reproducibility (S0 Gate 1)

user_id.description: Authenticated user or service account identifier

subject.description: The actor performing the action (user, service, or agent name)

object.description: The resource or target acted upon (e.g., 'database/orders', '/api/v1/predict')

outcome.description: Result of the action: allow (permitted), deny (rejected by policy), or error (system failure)

src_ip.description: Source IP address of the request originator

agent_id.description: AI agent or model identifier when the action involves an AI system

dataset_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the dataset used in this operation (S0 Gate 3 provenance)
